hero.heroDescription: A platform where ideas become products. Build a team, complete tasks — get tokens.

steps.step1Description: Describe your vision, set a token budget, and attract professionals to your team.
steps.step2Description: Bring your idea to life, enter the market, and strengthen the OpenTeam ecosystem.
steps.step3Description: Join the team and make a real contribution to the development of innovative products.
steps.step4Description: Earn tokens for every completed task or a stable monthly reward for your contribution.

projects.title: Active Projects

metadata.title: TeamHub — Your Idea, Our Team
metadata.description: A platform where ideas become products. Build a team, complete tasks, and earn tokens.
metadata.keywords: open team, project management, web3, tokens, collaboration, team hub

tokenSystem.title: Token Distribution in OpenTeam
tokenSystem.subtitle: The reward system is based on transparent criteria set by the founder at launch, strengthening the ecosystem after the product's release.

step1.title: Reward Mechanism
step1.description: Team members earn tokens for each completed task or receive a fixed payment for a specific role or period. This flexible format allows founders to adapt the project's economy to its specific needs.

step2.title: Team Reserve Pool
step2.description: The founder determines the token allocation for the team based on the chosen business model. For example: 5M tokens (for 20% of profit) or 100k tokens (for 1% of profit). Tokens become available after the project launch; the model can also include milestone-based unlocks or a reserve for future key roles.

step3.title: Burning and Sustainability
step3.description: Once a project becomes profitable, 20% of its revenue is allocated to buying back and burning OpenTeam tokens. This reduces the amount of tokens in circulation and supports the ecosystem's long-term value.
step3.linkLabel: Learn more about the burn mechanics
